heading: Revocation of an order of confirmation

children.label: a
children.text: On request of a party in interest at any time within 180 days after the date of the entry of an order of confirmation under , and after notice and a hearing, the court may revoke such order if such order was procured by fraud.section 1225 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: If the court revokes an order of confirmation under subsection (a) of this section, the court shall dispose of the case under , unless, within the time fixed by the court, the debtor proposes and the court confirms a modification of the plan under .section 1207 of this titlesection 1229 of this title
